H7401.strongs_def: to soften (intransitively or transitively), used figuratively
H7401.kjv_def: (be) faint(-hearted), mollify, (be, make) soft(-er), be tender.

H7406.strongs_def: a mountain ridge (as of tied summits)

H7409.strongs_def: a relay of animals on a post-route (as stored up for that purpose); by implication, a courser

H7410.strongs_def: Ram, the name of an Arabian and of an Israelite

H7411.strongs_def: to hurl; specifically, to shoot; figuratively, to delude or betray (as if causing to fall)
H7411.kjv_def: beguile, betray, (bow-) man, carry, deceive, throw.

H7413.strongs_def: a height (as a seat of idolatry)

H7414.strongs_def: Ramah, the name of four places in Palestine

H7415.derivation: from H7426 (רָמַם) in the sense of breeding (compare H7311 (רוּם));
H7415.strongs_def: a maggot (as rapidly bred), literally or figuratively

H7416.strongs_def: a pomegranate, the tree (from its upright growth) or the fruit (also an artificial ornament)

H7417.derivation: or (shorter) (רִמֹּן; or רִמּוֹנוֹ; (1 Chronicles 6:62 (H77 (אֶבֶץ))), the same as H7416 (רִמּוֹן); in Joshua 19:13: הַמְּתֹאָר is mistaken for part of a name; article with the passive participle of H8388 (תָּאַר); the (one) marked off, i.e. which pertains).
H7417.strongs_def: Rimmon, the name of a Syrian deity, also of five places in Palestine
H7417.pos: proper noun with reference to deity, proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7418.derivation: or רָמַת נֶגֶב; from the plural or construct form of H7413 (רָמָה) and H5045 (נֶגֶב); heights (or height) of the South;
H7418.strongs_def: Ramoth-Negeb or Ramath-Negeb, a place in Palestine
H7418.kjv_def: south Ramoth, Ramath of the south.

H7420.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hurl;
H7420.strongs_def: a lance (as thrown); especially the iron point

H7422.derivation: from H7311 (רוּם) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has raised;

H7423.kjv_def: deceit(-ful, -fully), false, guile, idle, slack, slothful.
H7423.usage: deceitful(4x), deceitfully(3x), deceit(2x), slothful(2x), false(1x), guile(1x), idle(1x), slack(1x)

H7425.derivation: from an unused root and H3050 (יָהּ) (perhaps meaning to deck); Jah has bedecked;

H7426.kjv_def: exalt, get (oneself) up, lift up (self), mount up.

H7427.derivation: from the active participle of H7426 (רָמַם);

H7428.derivation: from H7416 (רִמּוֹן) and H6556 (פֶּרֶץ); pomegranate of the breach;
H7428.strongs_def: Rimmon-Perets, a place in the Desert

H7429.strongs_def: to tread upon (as a potter, in walking or abusively)
H7429.kjv_def: oppressor, stamp upon, trample (under feet), tread (down, upon).

H7430.strongs_def: properly, to glide swiftly, i.e. to crawl or move with short steps; by analogy to swarm

H7431.strongs_def: a reptile or any other rapidly moving animal

H7433.derivation: or רָמוֹת גִּלעָד; (2 Chronicles 22:5), from the plural of H7413 (רָמָה) and H1568 (גִּלְעָד); heights of Gilad;
H7433.strongs_def: Ramoth-Gilad, a place East of the Jordan
H7433.kjv_def: Ramoth-gilead, Ramoth in Gilead. See also H7216 (רָאמוֹת).
H7433.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7434.derivation: from H7413 (רָמָה) and H4707 (מִצְפֶּה) with the article interpolated; height of the watch-tower;

H7435.strongs_def: a Ramathite or inhabitant of Ramah

H7436.derivation: from the dual of H7413 (רָמָה) and the plural of the active participle of H6822 (צָפָה); double height of watchers;

H7437.derivation: from H7413 (רָמָה) and H3895 (לְחִי); height of a jaw-bone;

H7440.strongs_def: properly, a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief)
H7440.kjv_def: cry, gladness, joy, proclamation, rejoicing, shouting, sing(-ing), triumph.
H7440.usage: cry(12x), singing(9x), rejoicing(3x), joy(3x), gladness(1x), proclamation(1x), shouting(1x), sing(1x), songs(1x), triumph(1x)

H7442.strongs_def: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
H7442.kjv_def: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

H7446.derivation: from H7450 (רָסַס); a ruin (as dripping to pieces);
H7446.strongs_def: Rissah, a place in the Desert

H7447.strongs_def: properly, dripping to pieces, i.e. a ruin; also a dew-drop

H7448.derivation: from an unused root meaning to curb;
H7448.strongs_def: a halter (as restraining); by implication, the jaw

H7450.derivation: a primitive root; to comminute; used only as denominative from H7447 (רָסִיס),

H7451.strongs_def: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
H7451.kjv_def: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-ful), ill (favoured), [phrase] mark, mischief(-vous), misery, naught(-ty), noisome, [phrase] not please, sad(-ly), sore, sorrow, trouble, vex, wicked(-ly, -ness, one), worse(-st), wretchedness, wrong. (Incl. feminine raaah; as adjective or noun.).
H7451.pos: absolute state masculine plural intensive noun
H7451.usage: evil(442x), wickedness(59x), wicked(25x), mischief(21x), hurt(20x), bad(13x), trouble(10x), sore(9x), affliction(6x), ill(5x), adversity(4x), harm(3x), naught(3x), noisome(2x), grievous(2x), sad(2x)

H7452.strongs_def: a crash (of thunder), noise (of war), shout (of joy)

H7453.kjv_def: brother, companion, fellow, friend, husband, lover, neighbour, [idiom] (an-) other.
H7453.usage: neighbour(102x), friend(42x), another(23x), fellow(10x), companion(5x), other(2x), brother(1x), husband(1x), lovers(1x)

H7455.kjv_def: [idiom] be so bad, badness, ([idiom] be so) evil, naughtiness, sadness, sorrow, wickedness.
H7455.usage: evil(11x), wickedness(3x), bad(1x), badness(1x), naughtiness(1x), sorrow(1x), sadness(1x)

H7456.kjv_def: (suffer to) famish, (be, have, suffer, suffer to) hunger(-ry).

H7461.derivation: or (feminine) רְעָדָהxlit rᵉâdâh corrected to rᵉʻâdâh; from H7460 (רָעַד);

H7462.strongs_def: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
H7462.kjv_def: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house, shepherd, wander, waste.
H7462.usage: feed(75x), shepherd(63x), pastor(8x), herdmen(7x), keep(3x), companion(2x), broken(1x), company(1x), devour(1x), eat(1x), entreateth(1x)

H7466.derivation: for H7471 (רְעִי) in the sense of H7453 (רֵעַ); friend;

H7467.derivation: from the same as H7466 (רְעוּ) and H410 (אֵל); friend of God;
H7467.strongs_def: Reuel, the name of Moses' father-in-law, also of an Edomite and an Israelite

H7468.derivation: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of H7453 (רֵעַ);
H7468.strongs_def: a female associate; generally an additional one

H7469.strongs_def: a feeding upon, i.e. grasping after

H7475.derivation: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of H7469 (רְעוּת);

H7480.derivation: from H7477 (רָעַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); made to tremble (i.e. fearful) of Jah;

H7481.strongs_def: to tumble, i.e. be violently agitated; specifically, to crash (of thunder); figuratively, to irritate (with anger)
H7481.kjv_def: make to fret, roar, thunder, trouble.

H7483.strongs_def: the mane of a horse (as quivering in the wind)

H7484.strongs_def: Ramah, the name of a grandson of Ham, and of a place (perhaps founded by him)
H7484.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7485.derivation: from H7481 (רָעַם) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has shaken;

H7486.strongs_def: Rameses or Raamses, a place in Egypt

H7488.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be green;
H7488.strongs_def: verdant; by analogy, new; figuratively, prosperous

H7489.strongs_def: properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally)
H7489.kjv_def: afflict, associate selves (by mistake for H7462 (רָעָה)), break (down, in pieces), [phrase] displease, (be, bring, do) evil (doer, entreat, man), show self friendly (by mistake for H7462 (רָעָה)), do harm, (do) hurt, (behave self, deal) ill, [idiom] indeed, do mischief, punish, still, vex, (do) wicked (doer, -ly), be (deal, do) worse.
H7489.usage: evil(20x), evildoer(10x), hurt(7x), wickedly(5x), worse(5x), afflict(5x), wicked(4x), break(3x), doer(3x), ill(3x), harm(3x), displease(2x)

H7490.strongs_def: {properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally)}

H7492.strongs_def: to break in pieces; figuratively, harass

H7493.strongs_def: to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust)
H7493.kjv_def: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble.
H7493.usage: shake(16x), tremble(9x), moved(2x), afraid(1x), quake(1x), remove(1x)

H7494.kjv_def: commotion, confused noise, earthquake, fierceness, quaking, rattling, rushing, shaking.
H7494.usage: earthquake(6x), rushing(3x), shake(3x), fierceness(1x), commotion(1x), rattling(1x), quaking(1x)

H7495.strongs_def: properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
H7495.kjv_def: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).

H7496.derivation: from H7495 (רָפָא) in the sense of H7503 (רָפָה);
H7496.strongs_def: properly, lax, i.e. (figuratively) a ghost (as dead; in plural only)

H7497.derivation: or רָפָה; from H7495 (רָפָא) in the sense of invigorating;
H7497.kjv_def: giant, Rapha, Rephaim(-s). See also H1051 (בֵּית רָפָא).

H7498.derivation: or רָפָה; probably the same as H7497 (רָפָא); giant;
H7498.strongs_def: Rapha or Raphah, the name of two Israelites
